author: codex-agent

patch.value: Feature scope: settings schema/config command updates and deterministic item-level run summary persistence with bounded retention.
Configurable test-result tracking on PM items
Introduce settings-controlled persistence of linked-test run summaries onto item records for pm test and pm test-all.
A project/global setting controls whether test results are written to items; when enabled, pm test and pm test-all record bounded deterministic summaries without breaking foreground behavior.
Run pm test --run repeatedly and observe item record updates only when tracking setting is enabled.
Settings-gated test run summaries are persisted deterministically.
Adds auditability of test outcomes directly on work items.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: searched record test results to pm items and run_results scopes; no active item covers settings-gated persistence of linked-test run summaries on item front matter.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Owns setting schema,config key wiring,and item summary retention model.

message: Create feature for configurable test-result item tracking | explicit_unset=learnings,files,tests,docs,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,resolution,actual_result
